name: Operationalizing Generative AI: From Pilot Projects to Enterprise Standards
description:
**[Operationalizing Generative AI on AWS: From Pilot to Enterprise Standards](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/operationalizing-generative-ai-from-pilot-projects-to-enterprise-standards?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aws_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=sp)**

AWS’s AI ecosystem—spanning Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, and agentic AI frameworks—is rapidly transforming how organizations build and deploy intelligent applications.

However, many teams still lack the structured approach needed to scale these solutions securely, govern them effectively, and move beyond pilot projects.

Join this 2 hour technical masterclass to gain a clear, practical roadmap for operationalizing Generative AI on AWS and aligning your AI initiatives with real-world enterprise needs.

**Date:** Tue, May 26, 2026
**Time:** 12:00 PM EST

**What You’ll Learn**

* Core components of the AWS Generative AI ecosystem (Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, Agentic AI)
* How to transition from POCs to production-ready AI systems
* Best practices for LLMOps, governance, and security on AWS
* Strategies to scale AI workloads efficiently and cost-effectively

**[Register to explore how to build, secure, and scale Generative AI solutions on AWS for real business impact.](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/operationalizing-generative-ai-from-pilot-projects-to-enterprise-standards?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aws_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing&utm_term=sp)**

name: Strengthening Digital Workplace Security Against Modern Cyber Threats
description:
**[Securing Digital Workplace from Modern Threats](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/strengthening-digital-workplace-security-against-modern-cyber-threats?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=nplus_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=at)**

As organizations accelerate adoption of cloud-based collaboration, email, and document-sharing platforms, the digital workplace has become a prime target for increasingly sophisticated cyber threats. From phishing and identity-based attacks to insider risks and misconfigurations, the challenge is no longer just prevention but building a resilient, continuously secure environment.

This webinar is designed for decision-makers and security leaders seeking a strategic, real-world approach to safeguarding modern workplace ecosystems. It explores how vulnerabilities emerge across collaboration tools, how to strengthen identity and access controls, and how to detect and respond effectively to evolving threats. Beyond technology, the session emphasizes the critical role of governance, compliance, and continuous upskill in maintaining a strong security posture.

Attendees will also gain insights into building a structured, role-based cybersecurity capability enabling teams to stay ahead of threats through practical, hands-on, and industry-aligned learning.

**[Register Now](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/strengthening-digital-workplace-security-against-modern-cyber-threats?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=nplus_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=at)**

name: Introduction to Microsoft 365 Copilot
description:
Microsoft 365 Copilot Adoption Awareness QuickStart is designed to help organizations unlock the full potential of AI-powered productivity across Microsoft 365. In this LIVE masterclass, discover how to effectively adopt and integrate Microsoft 365 Copilot into your daily workflows. Learn how to enhance collaboration, automate routine tasks, improve content creation, and empower teams with intelligent assistance—driving efficiency, innovation, and better business outcomes across the organization.

**Date:** May 28, 2026
**Time:** 12PM - 1PM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft365-copilot-adoption?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)**

You’ll gain practical insights, real-world productivity use cases, and a clear understanding of how to successfully adopt Microsoft 365 Copilot within your organization. Walk away with actionable strategies to enhance team collaboration, automate repetitive tasks, improve content quality, and leverage AI-driven insights to boost efficiency and drive smarter, faster decision-making across the business.

**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**

**What you will learn:**

* What Copilot is (and isn’t): where it helps, where humans stay responsible
* **Security & trust basics:** data boundaries, permissions matter, “don’t paste secrets” rules
* **Free vs. paid:** what’s available in each and what value changes with paid seats
* “Art of the Possible” demos: 3–5 quick use cases across common roles
* Adoption path: what users do next (Phase 1 workshop or Phase 2 N+ path)

\*\*[Register Today ](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft365-copilot-adoption?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)\*\*and secure your spot - See You in the Webinar!!

Want to explore our upcoming sessions, register using the link below:
[https://cutt.ly/CtZwc2IL](https://cutt.ly/CtZwc2IL "https://cutt.ly/ctzwc2il")

name: Microsoft Copilot ROI Playbook for Business Leaders: Adoption to Impact
description:
This session will highlight high-impact Copilot use cases across departments, frameworks for measuring operational efficiency and productivity gains, and proven approaches for driving long-term adoption success.

**Date:** May 29, 2026
**Time:** 9AM- 11AM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-copilot-roi-playbook-masterclass?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)**

This session will provide practical insights into identifying high-impact use cases, overcoming adoption challenges, implementing governance and security best practices, and building a long-term AI strategy that delivers sustainable business value.

**What you will learn:**

* The Copilot Adoption vs ROI Gap
